faq-one-title: Who is eligible to purchase products on the Dubai Police Store?
faq-one-content: The Dubai Police Store is open to all citizens, residents, and visitors in the United Arab Emirates. However, certain official uniform items and specialized tactical gear are restricted and can only be purchased by authenticated Dubai Police personnel.
faq-two-title: How can I track my order?
faq-two-content: Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive an SMS and email notification containing a tracking link. You can also monitor your order status directly under the 'Orders' section in the 'My Account' page.
faq-three-title: What payment methods do you support?
faq-three-content: We support a variety of secure payment methods, including major credit/debit cards (Visa, MasterCard), Apple Pay, and local digital wallet integrations to ensure a seamless checkout process.
faq-four-title: How do I contact customer support?
faq-four-content: You can reach out to our Customer Experience Team by visiting the 'Contact Us' page, emailing us at support@dubaipolice.gov.ae, or by calling our official helpline for immediate assistance.
